Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,439Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 57

entry.title: always had a vision of us standing like this
entry.summary:
Author: folklorestars

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,691Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: “We’re leaving,” Buck declared.“In an Uber, I hope,” Ravi said, analysing the pair of them with a hint of amusement.“Oh, yeah.” Buck leaned forward, placing his hands flat against the table to deliver his very important details to the group. “We’re leaving in an Uber and going back to my place because I really wanna keep kissing Eddie. He’s a really good kisser. Like… really good.”Hen, Chim, and Ravi’s jaws fell to the floor.“Okay, champ. To the Uber!” Eddie said cheerfully, grabbing the back of Buck’s shirt and yanking him away before any questions could ensue.Or; Buck and Eddie drunkenly make out at the club and all the way to Buck's house.

entry.title: 𝑴𝒊𝒏𝒆 - 𝑖𝑚𝑝𝑙𝑖𝑐𝑖𝑡𝑙𝑦, 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑣𝑖𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑦, 𝑒𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑛𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦
entry.summary:
Author: Graceful_Ashes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,446Chapters: 26/28Kudos: 657

Summary: 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑙𝑖𝑣𝑒𝑠 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑡𝑤𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑑, 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑥𝑡𝑟𝑖𝑐𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑦 𝑠𝑜. 𝐼𝑡'𝑠 𝑎 𝑡𝑟𝑢𝑡ℎ 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑘𝑛𝑜𝑤𝑠 𝑓𝑢𝑛𝑑𝑎𝑚𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦. 𝐼𝑡'𝑠 𝑎 𝑔𝑟𝑜𝑢𝑛𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑓𝑎𝑐𝑡 𝑎𝑏𝑜𝑢𝑡 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘’𝑠 𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠ℎ𝑖𝑝. 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑦'𝑟𝑒 𝑏𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑓𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑑𝑠 𝑜𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑝𝑟𝑒𝑐𝑖𝑝𝑖𝑐𝑒 𝑜𝑓 𝑠𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑚𝑜𝑟𝑒 𝑎𝑛𝑑 ℎ𝑒'𝑠 𝑖𝑛 𝑛𝑜 𝑟𝑢𝑠ℎ 𝑡𝑜 𝑝𝑢𝑠ℎ 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑚 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑜 𝑢𝑛𝑐ℎ𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑤𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑠. 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑦'𝑙𝑙 𝑓𝑖𝑛𝑑 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑤𝑎𝑦 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟𝑒 𝑒𝑣𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑢𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦, 𝑖𝑡'𝑠 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑣𝑖𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑒. 𝑆𝑜 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑐𝑎𝑛 𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑒 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑝𝑒𝑜𝑝𝑙𝑒 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑛𝑜𝑤, ℎ𝑒 𝑐𝑎𝑛 ℎ𝑎𝑣𝑒 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑓𝑢𝑛. 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑤𝑜𝑛'𝑡 𝑠𝑝𝑜𝑖𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡 𝑓𝑜𝑟 ℎ𝑖𝑚. 𝐼𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑒𝑛𝑑, 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑙𝑤𝑎𝑦𝑠 𝑐𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑠 ℎ𝑜𝑚𝑒 𝑡𝑜 ℎ𝑖𝑚. 𝑂𝑟 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑙𝑖𝑣𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑡𝑜𝑔𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 ℎ𝑎𝑠 𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑎𝑔𝑎𝑖𝑛. 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑙𝑖𝑠𝑒𝑠 ℎ𝑒'𝑠 𝑖𝑛 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑡𝑎𝑘𝑒𝑠 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑡𝑖𝑚𝑒 𝑡𝑜 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑘 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑜𝑢𝑔ℎ ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑓𝑒𝑒𝑙𝑖𝑛𝑔𝑠 - 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑎𝑡 𝑎𝑙𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑛𝑒𝑑 𝑏𝑦 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑏𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑓𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑑'𝑠 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒𝑟𝑠.

entry.title: You're a Ghost
entry.summary:
Author: Little_Moon_33

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,566Chapters: 9/13Kudos: 33

Summary: "My memory is fine," Eddie snapped. "It's everyone else's memory that's fucked up." Rylen continued, ignoring the interruption, "we try to not offer too much information into their personal lives. Especially when that information can be harmful to the psyche." Ozwaldo opened the file, pulling out whatever was on top, offering it to Eddie. "Your Mr Buckley died, just about three years ago." -----AKA: What if the entire town gaslights (both accidentally and on purpose) Buck and Eddie that the other died in the 9x13 car crash.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,517Chapters: 12/24Kudos: 397

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 214,670Chapters: 44/?Kudos: 106

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: The Recipe Box
entry.summary:
Author: jette_writer

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,587Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 8

Summary: After Bobby Nash's death, Buck inherits the tin of recipe cards that once kept the 118 fed and whole. Cooking his way through them becomes his grief therapy. Eddie keeps "forgetting" to leave before dinner, sometimes with Chris, other times without, and one meal at a time, they learn how to be a family.

entry.title: The Closest I've Come To My Heart Exploding
entry.summary:
Author: Thasminsno1fan

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,330Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: Christopher gets into some trouble with his friends and authorities get involved. He gets taken home, and he tells the officer that "home" is Buck's place. Buck is taken aback by this. But he lets him in anyway, making sure to call Eddie. Before Christopher's father can arrive, Buck gives him a stern talking to. Feelings begin to rise to the surface, and late night ice cream runs turn into confessions.

entry.title: I don't know what I do if something happened to you
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,246Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 250

Summary: Bobby’s last words leave Buck lost in grief and guilt, slowly pulling him inward.As he retreats, Eddie is left on the outside, grasping for a connection that keeps slipping through his fingers.Sometimes, distance hurts more than loss.And sometimes, it takes everything breaking apart to bring two people back together.

entry.title: Unexpected visitors
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,978Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 228

Summary: “Well one of her old friends still lives in Hershey and you know, they talked and Maddie mentioned the pregnancy-““Still perfectly normal.”“And her friend ran into your parents at the store and told them about the pregnancy.”Buck froze.“And I mean you know, you know Maddie hasn’t spoken to them since she found out about… you know.”“The Jakeman thing.”“Yeah, yeah the Jakeman thing. She blocked their number. And even before that she didn’t ever talk to them about you really I mean- she never even told them about Rina or your leg or anything she- she’s totally been respecting your right to not want them in your life-““Chim. What exactly happened this morning?”“They must have used a new number to try and call Maddie because they got through.”“… Okay. Okay so my parents called. That’s… not great but-““They called to tell us that they’re in LA.”“They-“ Buck blinked once. Twice.He swallowed hard.“They’re in LA?” ...In which the Buckley parents come to town. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: You Are Not Alone, Believe Me
entry.summary:
Author: afternooncupoftea

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,695Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 52

Summary: “Okay, um, what else? Obviously, there’s more information because you wouldn’t be telling me this. Can you please just—” The lawyer nods. “Daniela had two daughters, twins, born May 10th 2015. Alena and Adela Buckley.”“I—you—what? You’re saying that I have two daughters?”OrBuck gets the unexpected news that he’s a father to two twin girls and the lawyer may or may not think that Buck and Eddie are in a relationship.

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,840Chapters: 3/365Kudos: 12

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Play Ball (formerly Nothing Left To Do)
entry.summary:
Author: hyperfixatedhoney

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,081Chapters: 15/15Kudos: 81

Summary: “Buck,” Eddie is standing next to Buck but shifts to look Buck in the eye. There’s a look in Eddie’s eyes that Buck refuses to let himself acknowledge. It’s soft, welcoming, it makes Buck believe whatever Eddie says, “I’m sure it’ll be fine. We probably just missed out on a hitter, there was that one guy out of Austin Bobby was trying to get”“Yeah, you’re right,” Buck agreed, Eddie was right, it’ll be okay, “Well, nothing left to do but win huh?”Eddie smiles, gentle and sincere, “Nothing left to do but win”. OR: Buddie Baseball AU (no actual knowledge of baseball required)

entry.title: Flowers in the Firehouse
entry.summary:
Author: fallenflyer140

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,394Chapters: 23/23Kudos: 70

Summary: Aila Callahan is the newest recruit to the 118 is a paramedic fresh from the Windy City. Fleeing her own past terrors, she finds solace in the Southern California sun and ocean breeze. New town, new job, even a new name. She sure as hell isn't in the market for a relationship of any kind, especially not her Captain.Bobby Nash is the Captain of the 118, leaving behind a history in Minnesota he tried to drink away. He's been in LA almost two years, divorced for one, and had no desire to even think about starting something with anyone. He does however, admire the figure of the newest recruit to the 118 a bit more than he really should.Events lead them to lean on one another, and eventually start to use each other as points of release for tension and stress. It wasn't meant to be anything more than that.In this version, Bobby's late wife is alive and their children didn't exist. She left him after he wanted to start anew in Los Angeles.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,526Chapters: 25/30Kudos: 583

entry.title: Leave Me Alone, Punk
entry.summary:
Author: MaskedmenMaruaders

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,652Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 51

Summary: "Buck." Eddie repeated, shocked by how easily it rolled off his tongue. "Strange name." "Y- Yeah, I get that a lot." "Suits you." Buck's eyes widened in surprise and Eddie swore he heard his breath hitch. "Thanks." Buck mumbled, rubbing the back of his neck as blush crept in. "But I should go- Class and all that. Uh, enjoy. Or don't. I gotta go." Eddie watched him leave, standing in the same spot he'd first seen Buck and left with more questions than answers. OR Buddie age gap fic.

entry.title: can a man not have a best friend around here?!
entry.summary:
Author: bird1ee

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,625Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 2,652

Summary: Ravi: genuinely im still so shocked that you guys arent part of the moblike it made so much sense in my headnext ur gonna tell me that Buck and Eddie arent divorced smh Eddie: WE ARENT?!?!?!?!?!?!?! Buck: ADKJADHFLA WHAT Ravi: what else was i supposed to think?!?!?!?! Buck: CAN A MAN NOT HAVE A BEST FRIEND AROUND HERE?!?!!   OR: What happens when you put Pining Idiot #1, Pining Idiot #2, and the rest of the 118 in a group chat?Surely nothing weird, right?...right??? *currently on hiatus/being rewritten!*

entry.title: Touched by Death
entry.summary:
Author: 911fan_gir1

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,434Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 18

Summary: The first time I encountered Evan was not his older brother, despite popular belief. When Evan first put it in the world, the doctors wooshed him away to be poked and prodded. An infant next to him was wailing. His skin melted into the color of his hospital teddy bear, and I knew it was his time. But this story is not of the little child of teddy bears but of Evan. When I took his next door neighbor his wide blue eyes met mine with surprise. Notes from Death:It is rare a human ever look me in the eyeAnd not join me, in my embrace His eyes were so intent, he caught me by utmost surprise. I tried to pull away gently but in the commotion his little arms grazed the skin above his right eye. I inhaled sharply. Never in the centuries of my job has a soul touched a living one. Evan began wailing as a large red dot appeared where his roommate had touched him. I was scared? Perhaps, that was the feeling I felt that day. But mostly I knew that Evan was going to be special, he had to be. For who could be touched by death, and live to tell the tale?Or A look at Evan “Buck” Buckley’s life through losses– as told by death
